a: Poshmark ($2.95 fee for items under $15, 20% fee for items over $15)
Mercari (10% commission fee, payment processing fee)
OfferUp (Free listings, fees for exceeding limits and final value fee)
ThredUp (Offers instant offers, focuses on clothing)
Chairish (Free listings for up to 10 items, commission fees for sales)
Shopify (Subscription based, for creating your own store)
OLX (Cars, real estate, and other items)
